name: Revolve Group, Inc.
business: REVOLVE is the next-generation fashion retailer for Millennial and Generation Z consumers, selling a curated offering of over 140,000 apparel, footwear, beauty, and accessories styles through two complementary segments, REVOLVE and FWRD. The company connects a community of millions of consumers, thousands of global fashion influencers, and over 1,600 emerging, established, and owned brands. It sources a significant portion of its products from China and other countries, and relies on third-party logistics providers for shipping.

exposures.sentence: REVOLVE is the next-generation fashion retailer for Millennial and Generation Z consumers.
We primarily rely on two major vendors for our shipping.
Over the course of 2025, we offered over 1,200 emerging and established brands through REVOLVE, including 28 owned brands, and over 500 brands through FWRD.
